PR titles must follow Conventional Commits (enforced by the PR title workflow),
e.g. `feat(providers): add Gitea ruleset detection` — the title becomes the
squash-commit subject on main.
-->

## What & why

<!-- What does this change and what problem does it solve? Link any issue: Closes #123 -->

## How was it verified?

- [ ] `make ci` passes locally (lint + format-check + typecheck + tests)
- [ ] New/changed behaviour is covered by tests
- [ ] Docs updated if user-facing (README / CONTRIBUTING)
